caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is seated in a recording studio, wearing over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt that features a logo with the text "Stay Humble". He is positioned in front of a professional silver microphone mounted on a black boom arm, with a grey acoustic foam wall serving as the background. Across the sequence, the man is speaking, and his facial expressions shift from an open-mouthed, animated expression to a more neutral, attentive look, and finally to a wide-eyed, surprised expression. His head tilts slightly as he reacts to something off-camera, while his posture remains relatively still. The camera angle remains constant, capturing him from the chest up as he engages in a conversation.
